generated_oml:
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.com/dtdf/vocab"
instance TemperatureForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted temperature trends for thermal dynamics prediction"
]

instance SafetyDeviationAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert triggered when temperature deviations exceed safety thresholds"
]

instance HeatbedPowerAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of heatbed power to maintain temperature setpoints",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FanSpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of fan speed to regulate cooling",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive temperature simulation for thermal dynamics forecasting",
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureForecastInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of temperature deviations for safety",
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyDeviationAlert
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of heatbed power and fan speed for temperature control",
    DTDFVocab:provides HeatbedPowerAdjustmentAction, FanSpeedAdjustmentAction
]

instance InternalTempSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor for heatbed area",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance InternalTempSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor for air circulation path",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance ExternalTempSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "External ambient temperature sensor",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTempSensor1, InternalTempSensor2, ExternalTempSensor
]

instance CalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm for thermal models using sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance FaultDetectorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithm analyzing temperature deviations",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance StateEstimatorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimator for inferring system state from sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance OptimizerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimizer algorithm for adjusting heatbed power and fan speed",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD-based geometric representation of physical system components",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical thermal dynamics model using differential equations",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, OptimizerEnabler
]

instance RealTimeTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data stream from physical sensors",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmission,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, OptimizerEnabler
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized architecture where calibration algorithms update models using sensor data from the Physical Twin, with the updated models informing monitoring systems for safety and optimization checks; human or algorithmic interventions trigger corrective actions to the Physical Twin."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms adjust model parameters using sensor data to maintain accuracy, and monitors validate system performance against safety and optimality criteria, triggering corrective actions upon violation detection."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication occurs via RabbitMQ protocol over Wi-Fi and Bluetooth networks using a Raspberry Pi 4 Model B as the communication hub. No details on bandwidth, latency, redundancy mechanisms, or security protocols are provided."
]
